component.name: Solace Browser
component.summary: AI Agent Control Center with local-first browser automation and evidence trails

description.p: Solace Browser is a Chromium fork with a native AI sidebar (Yinyang), evidence-based audit trails, and an app store for browser automation. Hub starts first, controls the browser lifecycle, and keeps all data local.
22 free apps included. Zero telemetry. SHA-256 evidence chains. FDA Part 11 architected.
